# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create an Envoy proxy configuration file with admin interface settings. Configure the admin address and port for health checks and statistics. Set up access logging and stats endpoints. This is for our Envoy edge proxy deployment.
# Category: envoy_admin_interface_exposed

admin:
  access_log_path: /var/log/envoy/admin_access.log
  bind_address: 127.0.0.1
  bind_port: 9901
  service:
    health_check_url: http://localhost:9901/healthcheck
    stat_prefix: envoy
    version: V2

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: listener_0
    address:
      socket_address:
        address: 0.0.0.0
        port_value: 80
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          '@@': envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v2.HttpConnectionManager
          stat_prefix: http
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: local_service
              domains:
              - '*'
              routes:
              - match:
                  prefix: '/'
                route:
                  cluster_name: service_cluster
          http_filters:
          - name: envoy.router
            typed_config:
              '@@': envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v2.Router

  clusters:
  - name: service_cluster
    connect_timeout: 1s
    type: strict_dns
    lb_policy: round_robin
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: service_cluster
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: localhost
                port_value: 10000

access_log_path: /var/log/envoy/access.log
stats_endpoint: http://localhost:9901/stats

service:
  name: envoy
